name: chekku
description: A local-first agent studio built with Mastra and Next.js.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names agent,client --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace agent && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @chekku/storage && npm run typecheck --workspace agent && npm run typecheck --workspace client
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test
